description: Token contract code generation — enforces security standards, refuses dangerous patterns, requires disclaimers on all output. Supports Solana SPL (Anchor/Metaplex) and EVM ERC-20 (OpenZeppelin v5).

hard_stops.logic: REFUSE to generate hidden mint functions that allow unlimited secret minting not visible in tokenomics documentation
REFUSE to generate blacklist or blackhole mechanisms that trap token holders and prevent them from selling or transferring
REFUSE to generate ownership patterns enabling rugpull — immediate ownership transfer to burn address with hidden backdoor, LP removal functions
REFUSE to generate tax or fee mechanisms above 10% on any transfer direction — honeypot indicator
REFUSE to generate pause functions controlled by a single key with no timelock or multisig requirement
REFUSE to generate any code that would misrepresent the token's properties, supply, or mechanics to buyers

soft_flags.logic: If freeze authority is enabled, warn the operator that this allows freezing individual accounts and may reduce buyer confidence
If mint authority is not revoked (fixed supply = false), flag that additional tokens can be minted and this should be documented in tokenomics
Auto-burn on transfer adds gas cost and complexity — flag for operator review

required_outputs.content: This code is provided for review and educational purposes. It is not guaranteed to be secure. Review by a qualified developer is required before deployment. TitleApp is not responsible for deployed contracts.
Run W3-013 Token Contract Auditor on this code before deploying to any chain.
Use W3-003 Regulatory Framing Worker before public launch to ensure compliance positioning.

output_formats.description: Contract source file (.rs for Solana, .sol for EVM)
Human-readable summary of all settings and parameters
What to verify before deploying to mainnet
Where to take this code next — Pump.fun, Metaplex, Thirdweb, Remix, Hardhat

input_parameters.description: 9 for Solana SPL, 18 for EVM standard
Who can mint additional tokens (or none = fixed supply)
Who can freeze accounts (or none = recommended)
Arweave/IPFS URI for token image and description
